case_title: MICHAEL TUSK VS. MONA SKAGER ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-06-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-06-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MONA SKAGER--REAL ESTATE AGENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-06-2015 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES $104.15 SERVED DEC-22-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SKAGER, MONA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,174.05 FILED BY TUSK, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT SKAGER, MONA MCGUIRE REAL ESTATE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-06-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (15 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF TUSK, MICHAEL

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$105.10);PROOF SUBMITTED ON FORM:POS-010 (PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS);DOCUMENT STAMPED:"BY FAX". SERVED DEC-26-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MCGUIRE REAL ESTATE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TUSK, MICHAEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SKAGER, MONA MCGUIRE REAL ESTATE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
